title: FIRST LAUNCH
body: Open a browser. Go to localhost:8088. The Gateway Setup Wizard appears on first launch — it only shows once.
code:
Browser → http://localhost:8088

  "Welcome to Ignition!"
  [Create My Gateway →]

This wizard runs ONCE on first boot.
After setup, this URL becomes the
Gateway web UI.
key: Setup wizard only appears on first boot
mistakes: Using HTTPS on first launch (cert not configured)
Trying to access remotely before opening firewall
